commit.message:
Add fiducials JSON dict parsing, README, and .gitignore

- fiducials parameter now accepts a JSON dict string (e.g. '{"nasion":[...],"lpa":[...],"rpa":[...]}')
  in addition to 'auto' and 'estimated' string options
- Add README.md with inputs, outputs, parameters, and pipeline position
- Add .gitignore (excludes out_dir/, config.json, product.json, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v3: Rewrite as reusable scraping toolkit for Chinese websites

Transform from a guide/tutorial into a library that others can directly use.

New architecture:
- lib/scraper.js: ChinaScraper class with 4 extraction strategies
  (auto, search box, API intercept, declarative)
- lib/presets.js: 13 battle-tested site configs (ByteDance, Tencent,
  Bilibili, Feishu portals, Boss直聘, etc.)
- index.js: clean entry point

API: scraper.scrape(target, options) handles the full pipeline:
  navigate → wait → search → click → extract → paginate → dedup

Old guide moved to docs/how-it-works.md.
Old scripts moved to examples/ with 6 new example files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: 专为中国大陆网站设计的数据抓取工具包 | Web scraping toolkit for Chinese websites — SPA rendering, anti-bot bypass, API interception

commit.message:
feat(layout-generation): add AI-powered layout generation using Qwen3.5 397B

Rebuilds layout generation from scratch using LLM-based approach via Atlas
Cloud API (Qwen3.5 397B A17B) instead of the previous algorithmic approach
which produced architecturally poor results.

Pipeline: user input → LLM generates room JSON → geometry fixer (grid snap,
overlap fix, wall alignment, area scaling) → WallGraph builder → Konva canvas.

Generates 3 layout variants in parallel with different creative directions.

TeamKaart had drie tekst-elementen die niet werden meegeschaald bij
uitzoomen: de teamnaam (header h4), de overzicht-samenvatting en de

commit.message:
Add compounding retainer MRR to DWY+VIP section and value stack

DWY: $300-$500/mo SaaS retainer per client after consulting ends.
VIP: $2,500-$5,000/mo (5x standard rate). Retainers compound monthly:
Month 12 conservative: $96K/mo (120 DWY + 24 VIP). Month 24 growth:
$600K/mo (480 DWY + 72 VIP). Added compounding MRR table, new value
stack row (8b), updated totals to $480K-$2.93M/mo, IP to $17M-$176M.

fix(ci): resolve OOM crash in test pipeline

- Switch vitest pool from 'threads' to 'forks' (separate processes
  per worker, so OOM only kills the worker, not the entire process)
- Update deprecated poolOptions to Vitest 4 top-level syntax
  (maxWorkers/minWorkers instead of poolOptions.threads)
- Add NODE_OPTIONS --max-old-space-size=4096 to CI test step

commit.message:
Add Discovery Engine, World-Wide Vox, 3-dot menu fix, and unified pipeline

- Discovery Engine: context-aware suggestion cards with glassmorphism UI,
  staggered animations, and auto-fill-to-send on click
- World-Wide Vox: automatic locale detection (25 Unicode scripts + 10 Latin
  heuristics), accent-prioritized voice picker, cloud TTS fallback, and
  dynamic lang switching mid-stream
- Fix 3-dot context menu: restructure AnimatePresence inside portal, memoize
  onMenuClose callback
- Unified message pipeline with atomic conversation creation, pipeline
  locking, and strict save-order protocol
- Modular server architecture (Express routes, middleware, services)
- Voice state machine, StreamProcessor, VoiceQueue with markdown stripping
- Zero-Wait Engine optimizations (silence timeout, API pre-warm, live
  transcript bubble)

Add view navigation, error handling, and tilt indicator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(mcp-a): MCP models and configuration (#24)

* feat(17.3): Slack channel adapter — Web API polling + delivery

Adds SlackAdapter(ChannelAdapter) bridging Slack conversations.history
(inbound poll) and chat.postMessage (outbound).  Extends the 17.1/17.2
pattern with a configurable allow_bot_messages flag and _is_valid_message()
helper for clean human-vs-bot filtering.

Security: sender allowlist, rate limiting, suspicious content scan,
bot_token never logged, _seen_ts deduplication, data["ok"] check
(Slack always returns HTTP 200).

35 tests, 909 total passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(mcp-a): MCP models and configuration — trust tiers, manifests, audit records

Introduces the Pydantic data layer for the MCP framework:

- MCPServerManifest: declares server identity, trust tier, transport config,
  and tool inventory; server_id validated to ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$ for safe
  use in tool name prefixes and audit logs; transport cross-validation enforces
  command (stdio) or url (streamable_http) at construction time
- MCPPermissions: full permission set with restrictive defaults (empty allowlists,
  exec=False, financial=False); domain entries validated for no path characters
- MCPSecurityConfig: global security policy with bounded timeout [5, 300s],
  non-negative financial limit, auto_discovered defaulting to "deny"
- MCPCallRecord: audit record that stores params keys only (never values) to
  protect secrets and PII in audit logs
- mcp package docstring with architecture overview

51 new tests (960 total); black/mypy/pytest all green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add 4-phase depletion sprites for berry bush, gold mine, stone mine (#352)

## Summary
- Process AI-generated source sprites (from `buildings/placeholder/`) to
80px game-ready assets in
`assets/sprites/resources/{berry_bush,gold_mine,stone_mine}/`
- Wire sprite configs into resource JSON data files with 4 depletion
phases: full → three_quarter → half → depleted
- Extend `prototype_resource_node.gd` with `three_quarter` and `quarter`
thresholds for 4-phase visual depletion
- Update resource JSON schema to allow new threshold properties
- Backward compatible: existing 3-state resources (trees) still work via
fallback logic

## Test plan
- [x] `./tools/ror lint` passes
- [x] `./tools/ror test` passes (1 pre-existing failure in
`test_archer_config_loads_scale` unrelated)
- [x] `python3 tools/data_check.py` — all 67 data files pass validation
- [ ] In-game: berry bushes show 4 visual stages as villagers gather
food
- [ ] In-game: gold mines show 4 visual stages as villagers gather gold
- [ ] In-game: stone mines show 4 visual stages as villagers gather
stone
- [ ] Trees still show 3 stages (full/half/stump) — no regression

Closes roots-of-reason-n4x.7

commit.message:
Switch SF data generation from threads to multiprocessing

Replace ThreadPoolExecutor with ProcessPoolExecutor to bypass the
Python GIL. Each worker process now has its own Stockfish engine,
enabling true CPU parallelism on multi-core machines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stakes: agents now lock 20% of resources as stake each round

Stakes were initialized at 0 and never updated. Now:
- Initial stake = 20% of starting resources
- Each round recalculates stake = 20% of current resources
- Stake grows with successful harvesting, shrinks with sanctions
- Cybernetic DAO minStake:30 now reachable for active agents

commit.message:
feat(03-policy-qa-rag): replace ChromaDB with numpy vector store; harden .gitignore

- Rewrite ingest.py: embed chunks with sentence-transformers, save to
  vector_store/ as embeddings.npy + texts.pkl + metadatas.json
- Rewrite retriever.py: cosine similarity via normalised dot product,
  module-level caching of model and store for Streamlit reruns
- Update app.py: surface similarity score in retrieved chunk expander
- .gitignore: add vector_store/, *.npy to prevent large binary artifacts
  from being committed; all .env files remain excluded via *.env rule

Reason: chromadb uses pydantic v1 which is incompatible with Python 3.14

security: full 2026 hardening — auth, CORS, CSP, input validation

- next.config.js: Add CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options,
  Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy security headers
- main.py: Restrict CORS to explicit methods/headers only (no wildcard *)
- security.py: Strengthen password policy — uppercase + special char
  required, minimum 10 chars (was 8 with no uppercase/special)
- auth.py: Remove remaining-attempts count from error message
  (prevents user enumeration + attempt counting attacks)
- marketplace.py: Add Pydantic Field bounds on all inputs (quantity,
  weight, lengths); remove raw exception details from 500 responses
